members.name: _DrawPort
members.signature: public void _DrawPort(int slotIndex, Vector2i position, bool left, Color color)

members.name: ClearAllSlots
members.summary: Disables all slots of the GraphNode. This will remove all input/output ports from the GraphNode.

members.name: ClearSlot
members.summary: Disables the slot with the given [param slot_index]. This will remove the corresponding input and output port from the GraphNode.

members.name: GetInputPortColor
members.summary: Returns the [Color] of the input port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetInputPortCount
members.summary: Returns the number of slots with an enabled input port.

members.name: GetInputPortPosition
members.summary: Returns the position of the input port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetInputPortSlot
members.summary: Returns the corresponding slot index of the input port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetInputPortType
members.summary: Returns the type of the input port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetOutputPortColor
members.summary: Returns the [Color] of the output port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetOutputPortCount
members.summary: Returns the number of slots with an enabled output port.

members.name: GetOutputPortPosition
members.summary: Returns the position of the output port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetOutputPortSlot
members.summary: Returns the corresponding slot index of the output port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetOutputPortType
members.summary: Returns the type of the output port with the given [param port_idx].

members.name: GetSlotColorLeft
members.summary: Returns the left (input) [Color] of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotColorRight
members.summary: Returns the right (output) [Color] of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotCustomIconLeft
members.summary: Returns the left (input) custom [Texture2D] of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotCustomIconRight
members.summary: Returns the right (output) custom [Texture2D] of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotMetadataLeft
members.summary: Returns the left (input) metadata of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotMetadataRight
members.summary: Returns the right (output) metadata of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotTypeLeft
members.summary: Returns the left (input) type of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetSlotTypeRight
members.summary: Returns the right (output) type of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: GetTitlebarHbox
members.summary: Returns the [HBoxContainer] used for the title bar, only containing a [Label] for displaying the title by default. This can be used to add custom controls to the title bar such as option or close buttons.

members.name: IsSlotDrawStylebox
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the background [StyleBox] of the slot with the given [param slot_index] is drawn.

members.name: IsSlotEnabledLeft
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if left (input) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] is enabled.

members.name: IsSlotEnabledRight
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if right (output) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] is enabled.

members.name: SetSlot
members.signature: public void SetSlot(int slotIndex, bool enableLeftPort, int typeLeft, Color colorLeft, bool enableRightPort, int typeRight, Color colorRight, Texture2D customIconLeft, Texture2D customIconRight, bool drawStylebox)
members.summary: Sets properties of the slot with the given [param slot_index]. If [param enable_left_port]/[param enable_right_port] is [code]true[/code], a port will appear and the slot will be able to be connected from this side. With [param type_left]/[param type_right] an arbitrary type can be assigned to each port. Two ports can be connected if they share the same type, or if the connection between their types is allowed in the parent [GraphEdit] (see [method GraphEdit.add_valid_connection_type]). Keep in mind that the [GraphEdit] has the final say in accepting the connection. Type compatibility simply allows the [signal GraphEdit.connection_request] signal to be emitted. Ports can be further customized using [param color_left]/[param color_right] and [param custom_icon_left]/[param custom_icon_right]. The color parameter adds a tint to the icon. The custom icon can be used to override the default port dot. Additionally, [param draw_stylebox] can be used to enable or disable drawing of the background stylebox for each slot. See [theme_item slot]. Individual properties can also be set using one of the [code]set_slot_*[/code] methods. [b]Note:[/b] This method only sets properties of the slot. To create the slot itself, add a [Control]-derived child to the GraphNode.

members.name: SetSlotColorLeft
members.signature: public void SetSlotColorLeft(int slotIndex, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the [Color] of the left (input) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param color].

members.name: SetSlotColorRight
members.signature: public void SetSlotColorRight(int slotIndex, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the [Color] of the right (output) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param color].

members.name: SetSlotCustomIconLeft
members.signature: public void SetSlotCustomIconLeft(int slotIndex, Texture2D customIcon)
members.summary: Sets the custom [Texture2D] of the left (input) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param custom_icon].

members.name: SetSlotCustomIconRight
members.signature: public void SetSlotCustomIconRight(int slotIndex, Texture2D customIcon)
members.summary: Sets the custom [Texture2D] of the right (output) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param custom_icon].

members.name: SetSlotDrawStylebox
members.signature: public void SetSlotDrawStylebox(int slotIndex, bool enable)
members.summary: Toggles the background [StyleBox] of the slot with the given [param slot_index].

members.name: SetSlotEnabledLeft
members.signature: public void SetSlotEnabledLeft(int slotIndex, bool enable)
members.summary: Toggles the left (input) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index]. If [param enable] is [code]true[/code], a port will appear on the left side and the slot will be able to be connected from this side.

members.name: SetSlotEnabledRight
members.signature: public void SetSlotEnabledRight(int slotIndex, bool enable)
members.summary: Toggles the right (output) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index]. If [param enable] is [code]true[/code], a port will appear on the right side and the slot will be able to be connected from this side.

members.name: SetSlotMetadataLeft
members.signature: public void SetSlotMetadataLeft(int slotIndex, Variant value)
members.summary: Sets the custom metadata for the left (input) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param value].

members.name: SetSlotMetadataRight
members.signature: public void SetSlotMetadataRight(int slotIndex, Variant value)
members.summary: Sets the custom metadata for the right (output) side of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param value].

members.name: SetSlotTypeLeft
members.signature: public void SetSlotTypeLeft(int slotIndex, int type)
members.summary: Sets the left (input) type of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param type]. If the value is negative, all connections will be disallowed to be created via user inputs.

members.name: SetSlotTypeRight
members.signature: public void SetSlotTypeRight(int slotIndex, int type)
members.summary: Sets the right (output) type of the slot with the given [param slot_index] to [param type]. If the value is negative, all connections will be disallowed to be created via user inputs.

members.name: IgnoreInvalidConnectionType
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], you can connect ports with different types, even if the connection was not explicitly allowed in the parent [GraphEdit].

members.name: SlotsFocusMode
members.summary: Determines how connection slots can be focused. - If set to [constant Control.FOCUS_CLICK], connections can only be made with the mouse. - If set to [constant Control.FOCUS_ALL], slots can also be focused using the [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_up] and [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_down] and connected using [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_left] and [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_right] input actions. - If set to [constant Control.FOCUS_ACCESSIBILITY], slot input actions are only enabled when the screen reader is active.

members.name: Title
members.summary: The text displayed in the GraphNode's title bar.

signals.name: SlotSizesChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when any slot's size might have changed.

signals.name: SlotUpdated
signals.summary: Emitted when any GraphNode's slot is updated.

virtualMethods.name: _DrawPort
virtualMethods.signature: public void _DrawPort(int slotIndex, Vector2i position, bool left, Color color)
